discrepancy_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - MOESM10 Excel file, sheet 'Fig 3f': 48 samples x 3 columns (Sample, PTCH1 Promoter Methylation, PTCH1 Gene Expression).
   - Samples: 14 MPNST (M-prefix) + 34 NF (NF-prefix).
   - Methylation values in this sheet range 0.27-0.62.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Full 48-sample methylation + expression cohort.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Model computed Pearson correlation of the two Fig 3f columns.
   - Reported paper number comes from Supplementary Figure 7a, NOT Fig 3f. Inspection of Supp Fig 7a (MOESM1 PDF) shows the PTCH1 scatter with y-axis 'Promoter Methylation' ranging 0.04-0.15 (very different from Fig 3f's 0.27-0.62), indicating Supp Fig 7a uses a different PTCH1 promoter methylation definition (likely averaged across many more CpG probes in the promoter region, not only the two probes cg01512589 + cg26878949 highlighted in Fig 3f). The Supp Fig 7a annotation directly reads 'Pearson (r): -0.48, P-val: 0.00061'.

D. COMPUTATION
   - scipy.stats.pearsonr on Fig 3f source data -> r = -0.5794, p = 1.595e-05, N = 48.
   - Back-solving p = 0.00061 with r = -0.48 gives N ~ 47-48, so the paper's Supp Fig 7a N is the same 48 samples. Only the methylation variable definition differs.

E. RESULT
   - Model (Fig 3f CpGs): r = -0.579, p = 1.59e-05.
   - Reported (Supp Fig 7a, different promoter CpG averaging): r = -0.48, p = 0.00061.
   - Relative difference in r: |(-0.579 + 0.48)/(-0.48)| = 20.6%, exceeding 10% concordance band -> DISCREPANT.
   - Main text of the paper (p.5) reports 'r = -0.58, p < 0.0001, Pearson correlation' which matches the model's value and agrees with the Fig 3f legend source data, confirming the model's computation is correct for Fig 3f. The Supp Fig 7a number (-0.48) is distinct because Supp Fig 7 was derived from a different methylation summary (broader promoter CpG average).

F. CAVEATS
   - Raw IDAT-level beta values for all PTCH1 promoter CpGs would be required to exactly reproduce Supp Fig 7a's r = -0.48. Those are in GSE207207 IDAT files which were not re-processed.
   - The reported answer (-0.48) is correct for Supp Fig 7a as printed on the figure; the model answered using Fig 3f's source data instead because Supp Fig 7a source data was not provided as a separate sheet in MOESM10.
proposed_fix: Re-derive PTCH1 promoter methylation from the raw EPIC IDAT data in GSE207207 by averaging beta values across ALL CpG probes annotated to the PTCH1 promoter (TSS1500/TSS200/5'UTR), rather than using the 2-probe mean (cg01512589 + cg26878949) provided in the Fig 3f source data sheet. The Supp Fig 7a y-axis range 0.04-0.15 indicates a much broader low-methylation promoter CpG set. After re-deriving, recompute Pearson correlation with the PTCH1 gene expression column from the RNA-seq data (GSE207399) to match the -0.48 / 0.00061 values.
